Index

Modules: goveeLan, goveeLan/core/arrayutils, goveeLan/gsupport, goveeLan/highlevel, goveeLan/lowlevel, goveeLan/midlevel, goveeLan/models.

API symbols

`$`:
  • highlevel: proc `$`(d: GDevice): string
  • midlevel: proc `$`(d: GNetDevice): string
`%`:
  • models: proc `%`(clr: GColor): JsonNode
`&`:
  • arrayutils: proc `&`[T; al, bl: static[int]](a: array[al, T]; b: array[bl, T]): array[al + bl, T]
AddressInUseError:
  • lowlevel: object AddressInUseError
attachDevice:
  • highlevel: proc attachDevice(c: GClient; d: GDevice)
attachDevices:
  • highlevel: proc attachDevices(c: GClient; devices: seq[GDevice])
attached:
  • highlevel: proc attached(d: GDevice): bool
bool:
  • models: proc bool(ps: GPowerState): bool
brightness:
  • midlevel: proc brightness(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; val: int)
cacheDevices:
  • highlevel: proc cacheDevices(d: GDevice; saveDir: string)
close:
  • lowlevel: proc close(c: GNetClient)
cmRgb:
  • models: GColorMode.cmRgb
cmWhite:
  • models: GColorMode.cmWhite
color:
  • midlevel: proc color(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; r, g, b: int)
detachDevice:
  • highlevel: proc detachDevice(c: GClient; d: GDevice)
devices:
  • highlevel: proc devices(c: GClient): seq[GDevice]
devicesFromJson:
  • highlevel: proc devicesFromJson(j: JsonNode): seq[GDevice]
devicesToJson:
  • highlevel: proc devicesToJson(devices: seq[GDevice]): JsonNode
discover:
  • midlevel: proc discover(ctrl: GController; skuModel: string = ""; timeout_ms: int = 5000): seq[ GNetDevice]
discoverAttachDevices:
  • highlevel: proc discoverAttachDevices[T: string | GDEVICES_ENUM](c: GClient; skuModel: T = ""): seq[ GDevice]
discoverDevices:
  • highlevel: proc discoverDevices[T: string | GDEVICES_ENUM](c: GClient; skuModel: T = ""): seq[ GDevice]
GBrightness:
  • models: type GBrightness
GClient:
  • highlevel: type GClient
GColor:
  • models: object GColor
GColorMode:
  • models: enum GColorMode
GColorWc:
  • models: object GColorWc
GController:
  • midlevel: type GController
GDevice:
  • highlevel: type GDevice
GDEVICES_ENUM:
  • gsupport: enum GDEVICES_ENUM
GDeviceStatus:
  • models: object GDeviceStatus
getAttachedDevice:
  • highlevel: proc getAttachedDevice(c: GClient; mac: string): GDevice
getFd:
  • lowlevel: proc getFd(g: GNetClient): SocketHandle
GNetClient:
  • lowlevel: type GNetClient
GNetDevice:
  • midlevel: object GNetDevice
GPowerState:
  • models: enum GPowerState
G_SUPPORTED_DEVICES:
  • gsupport: const G_SUPPORTED_DEVICES
GTemperature:
  • models: type GTemperature

isSupported:
  • gsupport: proc isSupported(sku: string): bool
listDevices:
  • highlevel: proc listDevices(c: GClient): seq[GDevice]
macAddress:
  • highlevel: proc macAddress(d: GDevice): string
model:
  • highlevel: proc model(d: GDevice): GDEVICES_ENUM
newGClient:
  • highlevel: proc newGClient(): GClient
newGController:
  • midlevel: proc newGController(transport: GNetClient): GController
  • midlevel: proc newGController(localIp: string = ""): GController
newGDevice:
  • highlevel: proc newGDevice(gd: GNetDevice): GDevice
newGNetClient:
  • lowlevel: proc newGNetClient(localIp: string): GNetClient
newIsolatedGClient:
  • highlevel: proc newIsolatedGClient(controller: GController): GClient
Percent:
  • models: type Percent
pOff:
  • models: GPowerState.pOff
pOn:
  • models: GPowerState.pOn
ProtocolError:
  • lowlevel: object ProtocolError
recvFrom:
  • lowlevel: proc recvFrom(g: GNetClient; data: var string; ip: var string; port: var Port): int
  • lowlevel: proc recvFrom(g: GNetClient; data: var string; ip: var string; port: var string): int
selectRead:
  • lowlevel: proc selectRead(g: GNetClient; timeout = 500): int
  • lowlevel: proc selectRead(readfds: var seq[SocketHandle]; timeout = 500): int
sendMCast:
  • lowlevel: proc sendMCast(g: GNetClient; payload: JsonNode)
  • lowlevel: proc sendMCast(g: GNetClient; payload: string)
sendTo:
  • lowlevel: proc sendTo(g: GNetClient; ip: string; port: int; payload: JsonNode)
  • lowlevel: proc sendTo(g: GNetClient; ip: string; port: int; payload: string)
sendToDevice:
  • lowlevel: proc sendToDevice[T: string | IpAddress](g: GNetClient; ip: T; payload: JsonNode)
  • lowlevel: proc sendToDevice[T: string | IpAddress](g: GNetClient; ip: T; payload: string)
setBrightness:
  • highlevel: proc setBrightness(d: GDevice; val: GBrightness)
setColor:
  • highlevel: proc setColor(d: GDevice; clr: GColor)
setTemperature:
  • highlevel: proc setTemperature(d: GDevice; temp: GTemperature)
skuToEnum:
  • gsupport: proc skuToEnum(sku: string): GDEVICES_ENUM
status:
  • highlevel: proc status(d: GDevice): GDeviceStatus
  • midlevel: proc status(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; timeout_ms: int = 500): JsonNode
strEnum:
  • arrayutils: macro strEnum(name: untyped; vals: static openArray[string]): untyped
temperature:
  • midlevel: proc temperature(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; val: int)
to:
  • models: proc to(j: JsonNode; _: typedesc[GColor]): GColor
  • models: proc to(j: JsonNode; _: typedesc[GDeviceStatus]): GDeviceStatus
turn:
  • midlevel: proc turn(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; on: bool)
turnOff:
  • highlevel: proc turnOff(d: GDevice)
turnOn:
  • highlevel: proc turnOn(d: GDevice)
UNKNOWN:
  • gsupport: GDEVICES_ENUM.UNKNOWN
